title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API and Claude Code, to help sales reps draft customer replies in their own voice. The tool reduces administrative overhead and was created by a GTM product manager with no prior coding experience.
